title: A to Z Musical Xylophone, 8 Metal Notes, 23cm x 20cm, Educational Toy for 18+ Months
features: EDUCATIONAL DESIGN: 8 metal notes in vibrant rainbow colours help develop musical skills and colour recognition, perfect for children aged 18 months and above
COMPACT SIZE: Measures 23cm x 20cm, making it ideal for small hands and easy storage while providing a good playing surface
COMPLETE SET: Includes a sturdy xylophone with 8 tuned metal bars and a striking mallet, plus sheet music for popular tunes
MUSICAL LEARNING: Comes with illustrated song sheets featuring simple tunes like 'Jingle Bells' and 'Little Star' to help children learn basic melodies
DURABLE CONSTRUCTION: Features metal notes mounted on a robust plastic frame, ensuring long-lasting musical enjoyment and reliable sound quality
description: Introduce your little one to the magical world of music with this delightful xylophone from A to Z. Designed for children aged 18 months and above, this colourful instrument features 8 metal notes arranged in a vibrant rainbow sequence from red to purple. The xylophone measures 23cm x 20cm, making it perfectly sized for small hands to explore and create melodies. Each note produces clear, distinct tones when struck with the included red mallet. The sturdy white frame securely holds the metal tubes in place, ensuring safe play and musical discovery. The set comes complete with song sheets featuring familiar tunes like 'Jingle Bells' and 'Little Star', helping children learn to follow musical notation while they play. This musical toy not only entertains but also helps develop hand-eye coordination, colour recognition, and early musical skills. The durable construction and thoughtful design make it an excellent choice for introducing toddlers to the joy of making music.
